name: proposal-json-parse-binary
description: A repository template for ECMAScript proposals.

scripts.build-loose: node -e 'fs.mkdirSync("build", { recursive: true })' && ecmarkup --load-biblio @tc39/ecma262-biblio --verbose spec.emu build/index.html --lint-spec
scripts.demo:all: bun run demo:errors && bun run demo:decoding && bun run demo:json
